title: Reading - Part 1
instructions: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.heading: School Uniform Shop
questions.text: The uniform shop will be open on Wednesday afternoon for students needing extra sports shirts. Other uniform items must still be ordered online and collected from Reception next week.
questions.question: What can students do on Wednesday?

options.A: Buy one type of uniform item directly.
options.B: Collect all online orders from Reception.
options.C: Order sports shirts for next week only.

questions.explanation: Only extra sports shirts can be bought directly on Wednesday.

questions.heading: Message from Isaac to Emily
questions.text: Emily, I’ve nearly finished editing the video, but the last scene is too dark. Could we film that part again tomorrow after school if the weather is still bright?
questions.question: Why is Isaac texting Emily?

options.B: To ask about recording one part again.
options.A: To say the whole video is finished.
options.C: To cancel filming because of dark weather.

questions.explanation: Isaac wants to refilm the last scene.

questions.heading: Teen Running Group
questions.text: Join our friendly running group on Sunday mornings. We run slowly for the first ten minutes so new members can warm up. Faster runners may continue for a longer route afterwards.
questions.question: What does the advert say?

options.C: The group includes options for different abilities.
options.A: All runners must complete the long route.
options.B: New members should run fast immediately.

questions.explanation: There is a slow start and an optional longer route.

questions.heading: From: Mrs Wood / Subject: Geography models
questions.text: Your volcano models look excellent. Please do not take them home today because Year 6 students are visiting tomorrow and I’d like them to see your work.
questions.question: What does Mrs Wood ask students?

options.A: Leave their models at school for visitors.
options.B: Take their models home before tomorrow.
options.C: Make new models for Year 6 students.

questions.explanation: She wants the models to stay for Year 6 visitors.

questions.heading: Café Fruit Pots
questions.text: Fruit pots are made fresh each morning and kept in the fridge. They contain apple juice, but no added sugar. Please eat them on the day you buy them.
questions.question: What does the label tell customers?

options.B: The fruit pots should be eaten the same day.
options.A: The fruit pots contain extra added sugar.
options.C: Customers should keep them outside the fridge.

questions.explanation: The label says to eat them on the day of purchase.
